chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 723 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.3306/2020 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 16-09-2025 Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>>>..<<<<<<< On 09-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. This Petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 16.09.2025. Let intimation notice be issued to the Counsel for the Petitioner for the next date of hearing.” Though intimation notice issued to the Counsel for the Petitioner for today, even then none has affected appearance on behalf of the Petitioner. The instant Petition is pending without any useful progress. The conduct of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
